theme: From ordinary meetings to extraordinary experiences

linkedin.text:
A raise buys you 6 months of loyalty. A trip to Barcelona bought this client 31% lower turnover.

We flew 200 sales leaders out for 3 days: a golden-hour rooftop dinner, a Michelin-starred cooking masterclass, a Gothic Quarter team challenge, and an awards night they still bring up in meetings.

The numbers HR cares about:
→ 94% called it "the best company event ever"
→ Voluntary turnover fell 31% the next quarter
→ 3 more divisions requested the same trip

Since 2010 we've produced 200+ events across 120+ countries. The pattern repeats: recognition that feels personal is the cheapest retention tool you own.

Great events don't cost money. They make it.

📅 Comment 'PLAN' or DM us to map your next incentive trip.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #EmployeeRetention #Leadership

facebook.text:
We asked a CEO why she keeps sending her team abroad instead of handing out bonuses. Her answer: "Because they remember the trip." 💬

Last year we took 200 of her sales leaders to Barcelona. A rooftop dinner at sunset. A Michelin cooking class. A team challenge through the Gothic Quarter. An awards night they still bring up.

Then the results landed:
✅ 94% rated it "best company event ever"
✅ Voluntary turnover dropped 31%
✅ 3 more divisions asked for the same trip

Great events don't cost — they pay back.

Thinking about your team? Send us a message and tell us who you want to reward.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #Barcelona #TeamBuilding #EmployeeEngagement #MICE
